title: iberis tenoreana var. spruneri
intro: Iberis tenoreana var. spruneri, also known as Rock Cress, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rock Cress include its ability to reduce congestion, alleviate sinus pressure, and soothe sore throats. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to aid in the relief of respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
